config.title: Produkt
config.script:
@@nxub_script_include_inject_marker@@ @@nxub_script_code_inject_marker@@
function fopen() : fopen = true nx_fopen end function function fclose() nx_fclose end function

page.body:
<% const FORM_SPAN = 2
with nxfb_ .form_colspan = FORM_SPAN .begin_form .begin_flat_section "Ogolne" .newrow .write_field "pJednostkaEwid" .newrow .write_field "strNazwa" .newrow .write_field "strIndeks" .newrow .write_field "strNazwaMiedzynarodowa" .newrow ' .write_field "strSkrot" .newrow .write_field "eVAT" .newrow .write_field "pUlotka" .newrow .write_field "pGrupaProd" .newrow .write_field "strOpis" .newrow ' .nxub_.newrow.newcell %>
<% .newrow .write_field "strIndeks" .end_flat_section .end_form end with %>
